heading: Prohibition on use of funds for facilities in Israel, Jerusalem, or West Bank
label: 4862 Prohibition on use of funds for facilities in Israel, Jerusalem, or West Bank
text: None of the funds authorized to be appropriated by this Act may be obligated or expended for site acquisition, development, or construction of any facility in Israel, Jerusalem, or the West Bank.
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in text, is , , , known as the Omnibus Diplomatic Security and Antiterrorism Act of 1986. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 99–399100 Stat. 853section 4801 of this titleAug. 27, 1986
